text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ouch, ouch, ouch! That hurts like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I have to hurry and get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! At times like this, I can just tape
up, take some painkillers, and push through!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As long as I tend to my injury properly, I'll be able
to keep going!
choice_data_list:
Okay, but I'm stopping you if you try anything
reckless.

Okay, but I'm stopping you if you try anything
reckless.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As long as I tend to my injury properly, I'll be able
to keep going!
choice_data_list:
Okay, but I'm stopping you if you try anything
reckless.

Okay, but I'm stopping you if you try anything
reckless.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But... if I just fix the pain, then I can keep running!
choice_data_list:
Suppressing the pain won't help your injury
heal.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're right... If I just end up making it
worse, that will defeat the whole purpose...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Waiting around patiently just isn't in my nature!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay! I promise I won't do anything rash!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started right away, then. Umm, is the
medical tape in the medicine cabinet?
choice_data_list: Oh, I'll go find it for you!
Oh, I'll go find it for you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Eeek! Owowow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess takes a tumble and aggravates
her injury. Naturally, I tell her to take time off to
recover.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer, can I ask you to fetch the tape
from the medicine cabinet?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Time for some Princess Taping! Pain, pain, go
away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Now I can get back to strength training no
problem!
choice_data_list: You look like you're doing fine!
You look like you're doing fine!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Thank you for believing in me and letting
me continue my training.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I feel like I can overcome any obstacle
that stands in my way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: As long as I have you by my side, of course.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And on that note, it's time to plunge back into
training! Full throttle! But with caution! Let's get
lifting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess is able to overcome
her injury and continue her training, taking care
not to push herself too hard.
